query:
ALTER TABLE `userGroupMembership` 
ADD COLUMN `roleInGroup` varchar(100),
ADD COLUMN `reportsToUserId` int,
ADD COLUMN `canApprove` boolean DEFAULT false,
ADD COLUMN `approvalLimit` decimal(15,2),
ADD COLUMN `isGroupAdmin` boolean DEFAULT false,
ADD COLUMN `notificationPreferences` json;
